head: d022012b6047f70e14a9344d8c31d896048c1c32

semantics.READY: READY means the metric was executed against current inputs and validated (numerator/denominator/pct computed or explicitly unavailable fields set). Code existence alone never yields READY.
semantics.PARTIAL: PARTIAL means the metric was computed with explicit limitations (incomplete sample, single-source strata, reduced confidence). PARTIAL is never equivalent to READY and never counts as campaign DONE.
semantics.NOT_READY: NOT_READY means the metric could not be computed from available inputs (missing session, incomplete sample, entity-level gap, etc.).
semantics.BLOCKED: BLOCKED means computation is impeded by an external or technical dependency (credentials, network, missing source access).

dod_items_closed: PARTIAL significa parcialmente disponível com limitações explícitas
BLOCKED significa impedido por dependência externa ou técnica
